steps.title: Identify the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage uses “Although this approach offers unique benefits... it remains a relatively underutilized resource” to show a clear contradiction between hDNA's value and its usage. The keyword “Although” signals this trade-off structure.

steps.title: Match the supported claim
steps.content:
The correct answer must address both hDNA’s benefits and its underuse.

A ties to the first part of the sentence by highlighting “unique benefits” that justify its research value.

  • B mischaracterizes the scope (“mainly to pathogens”)
  • C wrongly attributes underuse to controversy (not degradation)
  • D incorrectly states a degradation comparison not in the text
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
